blockingIssues.description: DashboardQuickSwitchView does not render actionable load-error state: loadData() sets error on failure but UI branches only by isLoading/profiles.isEmpty, causing error cases to fall into empty state instead of retry/recovery UX.
DashboardQuickSwitchView accessibility announcements are not implemented; announceForAccessibility is a no-op so switch/launch state changes are not announced.
PopoverQuickSwitchView is not integrated into MenuBarPopoverView, so the requested one-step popover quick-switch flow is not available in the actual popover surface.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine switcher-ui-worker procedure enforcement so followedProcedure=true requires concrete manual UI sanity-check evidence in handoff.interactiveChecks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both dashboard-quick-switch-ui and popover-quick-switch-ui handoffs reported followedProcedure=true while interactiveChecks were empty.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and enforce context-read evidence requirements for followedProcedure=true across worker skills, including explicit examples of acceptable content-inspection evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fast-surfaces-fix-backfillscheduler-regressions and fast-surfaces-fix-reconciliation-float-assertions reviews both flagged missing required context-read evidence despite followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add assignment guidance to prefer skill-to-task fit and avoid assigning narrowly scoped project wiring fixes to specialized domain skills that require unrelated procedural steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: core-engine-fix-backfillcursorstore-build-break review noted indexing-efficiency-worker procedure was mismatched for a pbxproj membership-only fix.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated per-feature reports of missing context-read evidence for followedProcedure=true
